summary: Results-driven Data Scientist and Computer Science graduate with hands-on experience in machine learning, deep learning, NLP, and data analytics. Proven track record of building production-ready ML pipelines, automating data workflows, and delivering actionable insights through dashboards and predictive models.

experience.title: Marketing Data Analyst
bullets: Developed a live Looker Studio dashboard with Google Ads data via Coupler.io
Automated key marketing KPIs: ROAS, KUR, Revenue, Spend, Total Cost
Used Google Sheets for real-time metric calculations across 13 countries
Implemented dynamic filters, date range controls, and country-level breakdowns

experience.title: Junior Data Scientist (Biomedical)
bullets: Designed RAG pipeline using LangChain and OpenAI to generate health content from Semantic Scholar
Built rule-based and ML-powered recommendation logic using Python and scikit-learn
Automated NLP-based content workflows via n8n, integrating APIs like OpenFoodFacts and USDA
Defined backend logic for tip cards, nudges, and research-based video script generation
Collaborated closely on MVP design for Gen Z nutrition and wellness platform aligned with MAHA initiative

experience.title: Data Science Intern
bullets: Developed time series models for stock price forecasting, improving prediction accuracy by 20%
Designed churn prediction models with ~95% accuracy, helping identify high-risk customers and improve retention strategies
Created Power BI dashboards for market insights and automated data pipelines to streamline analysis workflows
Developed sentiment analysis pipeline using Python (NLTK/spaCy), increasing model accuracy by 31% through pattern-aware text processing

projects.name: Brain Tumor MRI Classification using CNNs
projects.description: Deep learning model to classify MRI brain scans into 4 tumor categories
bullets: Developed a deep learning model to classify MRI brain scans into No Tumor, Glioma, Meningioma, and Pituitary Tumor categories with ~98% accuracy
Applied image normalization, augmentation, and balanced sampling to improve model performance
Trained multiple CNN architectures, including VGG16, ResNet50, EfficientNetB0, and EfficientNetB1
Evaluated models using Precision, Recall, F1-score, and Confusion Matrix to select the best-performing architecture

projects.name: Air Quality Index (AQI) Prediction
projects.description: Forecasted Lahore's AQI using historical pollution and weather data
bullets: Forecasted Lahore's Air Quality Index (AQI) from 2019 to 2024 using historical pollution and weather data
Applied advanced feature engineering techniques including lag features, rolling averages, and weather variable interactions
Trained and compared multiple models; selected Random Forest Regressor as the top performer
Improved Random Forest R2 score from 0.8835 to 0.9579 through hyperparameter tuning

projects.name: Earthquake Prediction & Resource Allocation System
projects.description: ML system for earthquake prediction, impact assessment, and resource allocation
bullets: Built a machine learning system using USGS earthquake data for prediction, impact assessment, and resource allocation
Predicted earthquake magnitudes using an LSTM model, achieving RMSE of 1.24
Classified impact levels (Low, Moderate, Severe) with a Random Forest classifier, reaching 100% accuracy
Implemented a greedy algorithm to allocate emergency resources to high-impact areas
Created interactive visualizations: Time-series plots using Plotly, Impact-based geographic maps using Folium
